blocker_definitions.why_it_blocks_retest: Retest cannot be considered while the official readiness gate still says belum_boleh_retest.
what_must_be_true_to_clear: phase_b_retest_readiness_gate final_decision is no longer belum_boleh_retest
its dependency blockers required by the gate have been closed or explicitly reclassified
the refreshed gate is published as the active source of truth
what_artifact_or_decision_is_needed: formal gate closeout or status refresh decision on the updated provisional core stack

blocker_definitions.why_it_blocks_retest: Retest remains blocked while framework governance still fails on overlap risk, signal sparsity-flatness, candidate usability, and official retry reopening.
what_must_be_true_to_clear: framework_governance_gate no longer has active fail thresholds
official_strategy_retry_reopened is explicitly resolved at governance level
what_artifact_or_decision_is_needed: formal governance decision on strategy retry reopening status

blocker_definitions.why_it_blocks_retest: Retest should not be reopened while ATR/stop/candle logic still lacks a finalized corporate-action and back-adjusted OHLC policy.
what_must_be_true_to_clear: back-adjusted OHLC and corporate-action handling policy for ATR-stop-candle logic is finalized
the active provisional core stack references the finalized policy
policy coverage is documented as sufficient for retest governance
what_artifact_or_decision_is_needed: formal ATR stop corporate-action policy artifact
formal closeout stating the policy is finalized for retest use

blocker_definitions.why_it_blocks_retest: Retest should not be considered while the refreshed blocker closures are not synchronized into the governing readiness and roadmap artifacts.
what_must_be_true_to_clear: all minimum retest blocker decisions are reflected in active governance artifacts
roadmap, readiness gate, and operational decision artifacts are mutually consistent
retest consideration status is published without ambiguity
what_artifact_or_decision_is_needed: roadmap update that reflects the post-blocker state

sequencing_rules: Resolve retest blockers first and do not work on paper-trading-only blockers during this phase.
Do not open new strategy experiments.
Do not open retest because one blocker clears; retest may only be considered after all minimum retest blockers clear.
Keep paper trading blocked throughout this phase.
Use one blocker family at a time in the official sequence.
exit_criteria_for_retest_unblock: phase_b_retest_readiness_gate has an explicit close condition and is either cleared or formally refreshed from updated inputs.
framework_governance_gate has an explicit close condition and no longer fails on the minimum retest path.
atr_stop_corporate_action_policy is finalized for retest use.
retest_governance_artifacts_sync is complete across active artifacts.
No ambiguity remains about what must close before retest may be considered.
